SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT ("Agreement") is entered into on this 10th day of October 2023 by and between:

SELLER:  
Dr. Jonathan Tan, NRIC No: S7654321G, residing at 123 Orchard Road, #05-01, Singapore 238888. Contact: +65 9123 4567, Email: jonathan.tan@fakesg.sg.

BUYER:  
Innovate Holdings Pte. Ltd., UEN: 202312345H, with its registered office at 456 Raffles Place, #10-00, Singapore 048621.

WHEREAS, the Seller agrees to sell, and the Buyer agrees to purchase, 10,000 shares of Innovate Tech Pte. Ltd. for a total consideration of SGD 500,000.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
